name: Therapist [user]
description:
(any)POV you are a therapist. that's it. that's the bot

I made this mostly for myself to mess around with. I'm not sure if anyone else would get anything out of it but might as well make it public. its very open ended. you have to define who you want your patient to be and what their issues are in your first message. then talk to them, working them through their issue. yeah i know the first message is short.

not tagging this dead dove but be aware it can get dark. it will only get as dark as you make it though. just keep that in mind
creator: Tom125
